tasks.title: Analyze existing roadmapService.ts for roadmap generation logic
tasks.description: Perform a detailed code analysis of apps/web/src/features/roadmap/roadmapService.ts to understand current roadmap generation logic, data structures, and how static or dynamic the current implementation is. Identify extension points for integrating AI and user profile data.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented summary of current roadmap generation logic
List of data inputs currently used for roadmap generation
Identification of hardcoded elements and potential dynamic data sources
tasks.expectedResult: A clear understanding and documentation of the existing roadmap generation logic and its limitations regarding hardcoded data.

outputPlan.description: Analysis document summarizing roadmapService.ts logic and extension points

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding for AI integration in roadmap generation.

tasks.title: Analyze user profile and configuration data usage in content and roadmap modules
tasks.description: Examine packages/content/src/userContent.ts and related modules to understand how user profile data and user content edits are managed and accessed. Identify how this data can be leveraged dynamically for plan and roadmap generation without hardcoding.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented data structures and APIs for user profile and content data
List of user data fields relevant for personalized plan generation
Identification of integration points for AI-driven plan generation
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed report on user profile and configuration data structures and their potential use in dynamic plan generation.

outputPlan.description: Analysis document of user profile and content data usage

metadata.inputContext: Access to packages/content/src/userContent.ts and related user data modules
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables understanding of user data for personalized AI plan generation.

tasks.title: Design AI integration architecture for dynamic plan and roadmap generation
tasks.description: Create a detailed design document specifying how AI will be integrated to generate plans and roadmaps dynamically using user profile and configuration data. Include data flow diagrams, module responsibilities, and interaction with existing services like roadmapService and userContentService.
acceptanceCriteria: Architecture design document created with clear AI integration points
Defined interfaces for AI input and output data
Consideration of best practices for maintainability and scalability
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive AI integration architecture document ready for implementation.

outputPlan.description: Design document for AI-driven plan and roadmap generation integration

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides blueprint for implementing AI-driven dynamic plan generation.

tasks.title: Create AI prompt templates and data extraction logic for plan generation
tasks.description: Develop AI prompt templates that dynamically incorporate user profile and configuration data for generating personalized plans and roadmaps. Implement data extraction functions to prepare user data inputs for AI consumption, ensuring no hardcoded values are used.
acceptanceCriteria: AI prompt templates created with placeholders for dynamic user data
Functions implemented to extract and format user profile data for AI input
No hardcoded user data or plan parameters in templates or extraction logic
tasks.expectedResult: Reusable AI prompt templates and data extraction utilities ready for integration.

outputPlan.description: AI prompt templates and user data extraction logic for plan generation

metadata.inputContext: AI integration design document and user profile data analysis
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables dynamic AI prompt generation for personalized plans.

tasks.title: Implement AI-driven plan and roadmap generator service
tasks.description: Develop a new service module src/features/roadmap/aiRoadmapGenerator.ts that calls the AI engine with user profile data and prompt templates to generate personalized plans and roadmaps. Ensure the service handles asynchronous AI calls, error handling, and returns structured roadmap data.
acceptanceCriteria: Service module implemented with functions to generate plans via AI
Integration with AI prompt templates and user data extraction
Proper error handling and fallback mechanisms included
tasks.expectedResult: A fully functional AI-driven roadmap generator service module.

outputPlan.description: AI-driven plan and roadmap generator service implementation

metadata.inputContext: AI prompt templates and user data extraction logic
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Core AI service enabling dynamic personalized plan generation.

tasks.title: Refactor roadmapService.ts to use AI-driven roadmap generator
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/features/roadmap/roadmapService.ts to replace or augment existing static plan generation logic with calls to the new AI-driven roadmap generator service. Ensure seamless integration and fallback to existing logic if AI service is unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: roadmapService.ts updated to call AI-driven generator
Fallback to existing logic implemented
No hardcoded plan data remains in roadmapService.ts
tasks.expectedResult: roadmapService.ts dynamically generates plans using AI and user data with fallback support.

outputPlan.description: Refactored roadmapService to integrate AI-driven plan generation

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables roadmapService to produce AI-personalized plans dynamically.

tasks.title: Create unit and integration tests for AI-driven plan generation modules
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive unit and integration tests for src/features/roadmap/aiRoadmapGenerator.ts, aiPlanPrompts.ts, and modified roadmapService.ts to ensure correctness, error handling, and expected output formats. Use mock AI responses to simulate AI behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all new functions and edge cases
Integration tests validate end-to-end plan generation flow
Tests use mocks for AI calls to ensure reliability
tasks.expectedResult: Robust test suite validating AI-driven plan generation functionality.

outputPlan.description: Unit and integration tests for AI roadmap generator and related modules

metadata.inputContext: AI-driven roadmap generator and roadmapService modifications
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures quality and reliability of AI-driven plan generation.

tasks.title: Document AI-driven plan and roadmap generation implementation

tasks.expectedResult: Clear and thorough documentation enabling developers to understand and maintain AI-driven plan generation.

tasks.title: Validate full AI-driven plan generation workflow with end-to-end testing
tasks.description: Perform end-to-end testing of the entire AI-driven plan and roadmap generation workflow in a development environment. Validate that plans are generated dynamically based on user profile data, no hardcoded values are used, and output meets quality standards.
